description: Product Description King of Oud Perfume 100ml, King of Oud Eau De Parfum Men Perfume, Oud,Saffron and Musk Fragrance Perfume Our King of Oud Men Perfume has Fragrance Notes of Saffron, Nutmeg, Lavender, Agarwood (oud), Patchouli, And Musk Our King of Oud Perfume Is A Wonderful Present For Christmas, Valentine's Day, Anniversaries, Birthdays, And Other Special Occasions.
